MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Continued To Oct-02-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Production Requests And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DOW W. PATTEN, Esq. of Forthright Law, P.C. (Tel: 415-228-6848) for plaintiff;
Attys. SHANE YOUNG, Esq. and DAMON M. OTT, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, P.C. (Tel: 415-433-1940) for defendants Pacific Gas and Electric Company. and PG&E Corporation.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY, and PG&E CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Responses To Production Requests And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2022 Set For Trial On Jul-10-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
